# Cinebody

> Cinebody is the video capture platform that turns your community into your content team. Brands send a creative brief, and their employees, customers, and fans capture pro-quality vertical video on their phones, guided by patented shot-list technology. Teams then review, manage, and publish that video at scale. Optional Creative Services add strategy, direction, and editing, so a brand gets a steady stream of authentic video without a traditional production crew. Cinebody is made by Super 6 LLC and based in Denver, CO.

## Core pages
- [Software](https://www.cinebody.com/software): The platform. Send a link, set a shot list, and get pro-quality vertical video back from real people anywhere, with no app download and no production crew.
- [Creative Services](https://www.cinebody.com/services): Your content team without the headcount. Cinebody handles strategy, creative direction, and editing.
- [Pricing](https://www.cinebody.com/pricing): Plans for the software platform and for creative services.
- [Knowledge Base](https://www.cinebody.com/knowledge-base): Guides, answers, and best practices for using Cinebody.

## Case studies
- [Royal Caribbean](https://www.cinebody.com/royal-caribbean): Turned onboard crew across the fleet into an always-on content engine, no production crews flown in.
- [Point.me](https://www.cinebody.com/pointme): One shoot produced a connected-TV spot plus a full multi-platform campaign featuring 70+ real customers.
- [Nike](https://www.cinebody.com/nike): Captured authentic athlete and community video at the speed of culture.
- [Dell](https://www.cinebody.com/dell): Scaled authentic employee and event video across teams and geographies.
- [Georgia-Pacific](https://www.cinebody.com/georgia-pacific): Captured employee stories and brand video across a distributed workforce.
- [Altra](https://www.cinebody.com/altra): Captured athlete stories on the trail and turned them into a season of content.
- [Cogent](https://www.cinebody.com/cogent): Captured real festival and event footage and produced a marquee brand film.
- [Crocs](https://www.cinebody.com/crocs): Ran a high-volume campaign of authentic creator and customer video.
- [Sploot](https://www.cinebody.com/sploot): Shot once and produced a connected-TV spot plus a full set of social cutdowns.

## Notes
- Login for existing customers is at https://pro.cinebody.com/login
- Demos are booked via the "Book a Demo" links throughout the site.
